answers: Raspberry Pi = tiny affordable computer ($35-80). Runs Linux. Great for learning, projects, media center, server.
Projects: retro game console, media server, weather station, home automation hub, network ad-blocker (Pi-hole).
Setup: buy Pi + SD card + power supply, download Raspberry Pi OS, flash to SD card, boot, and explore.
Pi vs Arduino: Pi is a full computer (runs OS, browses web). Arduino is a microcontroller (one program, real-time I/O).
